case_title: JOHN PAXTON VS. BRENDAN QUINLAN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($10 SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-31-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN INDV. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PAXTON, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN INDV. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS. QUINLAN, ELIZABETH IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-16-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRENDAN QUINLAN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELIZABETH QUINLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAXTON, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN INDV. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS. QUINLAN, ELIZABETH IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($10 SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINLAN, ELIZABETH IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAXTON, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QUINLAN, BRENDAN INDV. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS. QUINLAN, ELIZABETH IND. AND DBA 330 PRESIDIO APTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
